focus: Fix Core Web Vitals radial charts - implement proper shadcn/ui radial charts with recharts
notes: Successfully fixed Core Web Vitals radial charts. Replaced custom SVG with shadcn/ui RadialBarChart components using recharts. Added ResponsiveContainer wrapper and explicit dimensions (h-[140px] w-[140px]). Charts now render correctly with circular gauge rings, centered values, and proper colors. Build passes with 0 TypeScript errors. Verified working in browser.
